Shooting Games (194)

Welcome to the Shooting games hub on PlayArcadeX. Here you'll find 194 free shooting games — aim-and-fire games from sniper challenges to all-out battles, where precision and reflexes are everything. Popular picks right now include Stickman3D Shooter, Zombie Grave Yard, Variety Mecha, Flying Robot Transform Car Games and Gun Shooting Game. Every game runs straight in your browser, with no download, no installation and no sign-up. Just click and play on your phone, tablet or computer.

About Shooting Games

Shooting games are aim-and-fire games from sniper challenges to all-out battles, where precision and reflexes are everything. On PlayArcadeX we keep this collection fresh, adding new shooting titles regularly so there's always something new to try. Whether you have five minutes or an hour, you'll find a shooting game here that fits.

All 194 shooting games on this page are completely free and work on both desktop and mobile. If you enjoy shooting games, bookmark this page and check back often — the lineup keeps growing.

Frequently Asked Questions

Are these Shooting games free to play?

Yes. Every shooting game on PlayArcadeX is 100% free to play, with no download, no installation and no payment required. Just open a game and start playing.

Can I play Shooting games on mobile?

Absolutely. All shooting games here run directly in your mobile browser on Android and iOS, as well as on tablets and desktop computers — no app needed.

What are the best Shooting games to start with?

Great starting points include Stickman3D Shooter, Zombie Grave Yard, Variety Mecha. From there, browse the full list of 194 shooting games above and find your favourites.
